atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a systolic ejection murmur of III/VI, best heard at the left sternal border.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lower extremity pitting edema is present bilaterally, grade 1.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's blood pressure reading in the office is elevated at 142/88 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An echocardiogram from one year ago showed a left ventricular ejection fraction of 45% and mitral regurgitation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports nasal congestion related to fall allergies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Congestive heart failure, stable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Hypertension, uncontrolled.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Continue current medications for congestive heart failure.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Increase lisinopril to 40 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Initiate lasix 20 mg daily as needed for symptom control.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a repeat echocardiogram in six months.
